headline: TD Cowen Lifts PT on Devon Energy (DVN) to $50 From $46 – Here’s Why
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the best undervalued stocks under $50 to invest in now. On March 17, TD Cowen lifted the price target on Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) to $50 from $46 and maintained a Hold rating on the shares. The firm released the rating update as it updated exploration and production models […]

headline: Winner's Hedge — Big Oil Locks Profits Regardless Of Whether War Ends Tomorrow
summary: Energy producers are locking in record profits as oil volatility batters Wall Street, creating a widening divide between insulated physical markets and increasingly fragile financial positioning.
